title: Hakka opera
summary:
Hakka opera (traditional Chinese: 硫뮌굲; simplified Chinese: 劉괜곦) or Han opera is a variety of Chinese opera from eastern Guangdong province, China. It enjoys a good popularity among Hakka people in Guangdong province.


== References ==
